testcases.input: s = "ab#c", t = "ad#c" Output: true Explanation: Both s and t become "ac".
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Both s and t become "ac".

testcases.input: s = "ab##", t = "c#d#" Output: true Explanation: Both s and t become "".
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Both s and t become "".

testcases.input: s = "a#c", t = "b" Output: false Explanation: s becomes "c" while t becomes "b".
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: s becomes "c" while t becomes "b".
